## Tests generated by this workflow

### Live MLX runtime tests

- Basic generation and availability transition
- Streaming produces output and can be broken after the first chunk
- Same-session concurrent generation rejection
- Fresh-session generation after stream break
- Different-session concurrent generation
- Multiple sequential turns and cache clear followed by generation
- Invalid model ID failure and failed-cache clearing

### Pure Swift audit-method defensibility tests

- Matched non-member controls
- Prompt-visible-token and canary-prefix exclusion
- Deterministic audit mode
- Bootstrap confidence intervals
- Minimum sample-size claim-strength warning
- Separate sub-scores plus aggregate score
- Threat model, limitations, and metadata export
- Answer-only/no-reasoning prompt variant
- CSV and Markdown report export
- Local bundle diagnostics for config, tokenizer, and safetensors files
